title: Moist Braised Dutch Fish Stew
description: A buttery and light Dutch dish featuring fish sauce aekjeot, perfect for a midnight craving, this low-carb-friendly stew is a delight to taste buds.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped leeks and cook until they are softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cod fillets and cook for 2 minutes on each side.
Add the fish sauce aekjeot, white wine, chicken broth, salt, and black pepper, stirring to combine.
Cover the Dutch oven and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Braise the stew for 15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter until melted.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top of the stew and serve hot.
